# TulsaGays
> A community platform listing LGBTQ+ events, bars, clubs, organizations, and resources in Tulsa, Oklahoma.

## Key pages
- /: Weekly updated LGBTQ+ event listings for Tulsa organized by day of the week
- /directory.html: Directory of LGBTQ-friendly businesses, bars, and organizations in Tulsa
- /about.html: About TulsaGays and the community mission
- /archive.html: Archive of past weekly event listings
- /newsletter.html: Subscribe to the weekly TulsaGays newsletter

## About
TulsaGays.com is an independent, community-run LGBTQ+ event listing site for Tulsa, Oklahoma. It aggregates events from LGBTQ bars, clubs, community organizations, and allied venues across Tulsa each week. The site covers everything from bar nights and drag shows to Pride events, social groups, and community activism. Tulsa has a larger and more active LGBTQ community than most people expect, centered on the Brady Arts District and anchored year-round by the Dennis R. Neill Equality Center and Oklahomans for Equality. The site is maintained by William "Ryan" Hunt, an HRC volunteer since 2011 and former VP of Fredericksburg Pride.
